hero.title: Case Studies
hero.subtitle: Real custom software implementations and their operational scope.

mariaCarissima.summary: We built a solution that unifies order creation, inventory checks, and showroom operations in a single workflow for the whole operation.
mariaCarissima.challengeText: The operation needed to unify orders, stock, and showroom tasks in one tool, reducing manual rework, improving traceability, and lowering friction with external syncs.
mariaCarissima.solutionText: We delivered a web management platform covering the full flow: order processing, stock control, pending management, and secure integration with external systems.
mariaCarissima.scopeItem1: Customer, seller, document, and warehouse management.
mariaCarissima.scopeItem2: Step-by-step order flow with search by code, color, or description.
mariaCarissima.scopeItem3: Editable cart with percentage or final-price discounts.
mariaCarissima.scopeItem4: Local and remote draft saving for continuity.
mariaCarissima.scopeItem5: Order history with filters and Excel export.
mariaCarissima.scopeItem7: Bulk stock updates from Excel (.xlsx) files.
mariaCarissima.scopeItem9: Secure remote access for authorized teams with internet connectivity.
mariaCarissima.impactText: The platform centralizes processes previously split across spreadsheets and external systems, improves operational traceability, and reduces manual errors. Metrics to complete with the client: [Process time reduced by X], [X% fewer errors], [N orders processed per month].
